title: Aim Slow
description: An minecraft mod that slows down your sensitivity
body:
# AimSlow

AimSlow is a client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft that slows down your mouse when aiming near entities. It can be configured using Mod Menu and is meant for players who enjoy a high sens but cant be precise when needing to track targets

## Dependencies

- Fabric API
- ModMenu (optional but recommended for config access)
- Cloth Config API (required for config screen)

## Configuration

You can access the configuration menu in-game via **ModMenu**. 
Settings include:
- `Slowdown Strength`: How much the mouse slows at the center of the bubble (0 to 1).
- `Bubble Angle`: The radius of the slowdown cone in degrees.
- `Lerp Speeds`: How fast the effect engages and releases (default 1.0 engagement for instant sweeps).
- `Min Multiplier`: The absolute minimum speed multiplier (to prevent your mouse from freezing entirely).
- `Max Range`: Only slow down for entities within this block distance.
- `Players Only` / `Ignore Teammates` / `Require Line of Sight`

## Compatibility

- **Client-side only.** You do not need to install this on the server.
- Compatible with most major Fabric rendering and performance mods.
